prompt: Create a warm sunlit travel flat lay photograph on beige linen fabric, styled like a nostalgic seaside vacation memory for Awaji Island, Hyogo, Japan. The main object is one large white Polaroid-style print placed slightly tilted, with a square photo showing a balcony breakfast overlooking calm blue sea and the Akashi Kaikyo Bridge in the distance under a pale blue sky. Inside the Polaroid photo, include exactly 7 visible breakfast items: 1 red patterned coffee cup with dark coffee on a saucer, 1 peeled banana half, 2 slices of white toast stacked, 1 small glass bowl of fruit and granola topped with mint, 1 dark grape or berry on the fruit, and 1 pale round boiled egg or dessert ball. On the lower white border of the Polaroid, add purple handwritten Japanese text reading また新しい景色に、出会いに行こう。♡. To the left, partially tucked under the Polaroid, place exactly 1 slim travel brochure with a blue cover showing a rocky sea arch and Japanese title text reading あわじ島 沼島 上立神岩 plus smaller subtitle text 兵庫県南あわじ市沼島. Surround the papers with exactly 5 beach still-life props: 1 woven straw hat at the top left edge, 1 pale seashell at the lower left, 1 rough cream textile fringe at the top right, 1 dried orange slice at the lower right, and 1 small leafy branch casting shadows on the right. Use soft natural sunlight, gentle leaf shadows, cream and ocean-blue color palette, realistic paper texture, shallow depth of field, cozy summer travel mood, high-resolution editorial lifestyle photography. Avoid extra objects, logos, watermarks, or additional text.
